case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. MANUELA O VISILESCU ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-19-2016. ANDRE LELIEVRE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ALEX VASILESCU APPEARING AS SELF REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE THE REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FORTHWITH IN ROOM 103. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
